llm_eval.notes: orchestrator with strong side-effect safety: --dry-run, default create-disabled fail-closed, page_id consistency + mismatch guard, log-on-failure for both url/log. Imported symbols (_extract_page_id_from_url/canonical_notion_id) verified to exist. Broad except blocks each have fallback+stderr, not silent. No PEP723 frontmatter; high cyclomatic complexity but justified for staged pipeline.
